listings.title: NEW IN BOX NIB $100 APEMAN C420D FRONT & REAR MINI DASH CAM
listings.body: NEW IN BOX $100 APEMAN C420D FRONT & REAR MINI DASH CAM. Please ask any questions before purchasing and I will respond within 24hrs. Price is firm. Not interested in any trades or barters. Posted on several websites, so 1st to come with cash in hand = 1st served! If this posting is active then it means the item is still available. Cash only (counterfeit pens on deck). Meet-up will be at a well-lit, public train station with consistent police presence, so please find solace in knowing that you will be safe. Pick up at North White Plains (NOT White Plains) train station. Will meet at the exact location in picture (under the sign). Available on weekends only. Thanks for looking. Good luck. 💯.

listings.title: NEW BACK ISSUES ROBB REPORT MAGAZINE COLLECTORS FULL YEAR RUN AUG '24 - JULY '25
listings.body: THE ROBB REPORT MAGAZINE COLLECTOR’S FULL YEAR RUN AUGUST 2024 - JULY 2025 BACK ISSUES LOT, NEW + 4 EXTRA BONUS LUXURY GUIDES BERGDORF GOODMAN, RALPH LAUREN, PORSCHE, RALEIGH CLASSIC Get your hands on the complete collection of Robb Report Magazine's back issues from August 2024 to July 2025. Immerse yourself in the world of luxury travel, lifestyle, and business with this highly sought-after set of publications. Filled with stunning photography and insightful content, these magazines are a must-have for any collector or enthusiast. Experience the elegance of Robb Report Magazine's stunning design and content, featuring articles on the latest trends in travel, fashion, and business. With a focus on quality and attention to detail, this set of publications is sure to impress. Don't miss out on the opportunity to add this valuable collection to your library. -LUXURY WITHOUT COMPROMISE- * AUGUST 2024: THE TRAVEL ISSUE * SEPTEMBER 2024: THE FALL STYLE ISSUE * OCTOBER 2024: THE SUCCESS ISSUE * NOVEMBER 2024: THE WATCHES & JEWELRY ISSUE * DECEMBER 2024 / JANUARY 2025 (DOUBLE ISSUE): THE GIVING ISSUE * (BONUS ISSUE): LUXURY PROPERTY GUIDE * FEBRUARY 2025: 22nd ANNUAL CAR OF THE YEAR * MARCH 2025: THE SPRING STYLE ISSUE * APRIL 2025: THE SKETCH DESIGN ISSUE * MAY 2025: THE ADVENTURE ISSUE * JUNE / JULY 2025 (DOUBLE ISSUE): 37th ANNUAL BEST OF THE BEST Annual U.S. Cover Price : $229.50 2 Year U.S. Mail Subscription Price: $179 1 Year U.S. Mail Subscription Price: $109 COLLECTIBLE ITEMS IN UNREAD CONDITION!!! Any light scratches, corner edge wear, creases and/or tiny nicks are typical and from the manufacturer/distributer as pictured. Absolutely no missing or damaged pages, no tears, no underlining/ highlighting of text or writing in the margins and no identifying marks on the inside cover. Ready to be added to a collectible library. Please ask any questions before purchasing and I will respond within 24hrs. Price is firm. Not interested in any trades or barters. Posted on several websites, so 1st come with cash in hand = 1st served! If this posting is active then it means the item is still available. Cash only (counterfeit pens on deck). Meet-up will be at a well-lit, public train station with consistent police presence, so please find solace in knowing that you will be safe. Pick up at North White Plains (NOT White Plains) train station. Will meet at the exact location in picture (under the sign). Available on weekends only. Thanks for looking. Good luck. 💯.
